story.iWant: REST API endpoints for Widget CRUD operations
story.soThat: the Widget aggregate is accessible via HTTP API

tasks.task: Use CommandGateway for writes, QueryGateway for reads
Write integration test for full CRUD flow
Commit: "Add Widget REST API with CRUD endpoints"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Endpoints implemented: POST /widgets (create), GET /widgets/:id (find), GET /widgets (list), PUT /widgets/:id (update)
Controller uses CommandGateway for writes, QueryGateway for reads
Integration test validates full CRUD flow via REST API
Swagger UI accessible at /swagger-ui.html showing Widget endpoints
All API operations return correct HTTP status codes

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: @RestController with @RequestMapping. CommandGateway.sendAndWait for writes. QueryGateway.query for reads. Request/Response DTOs separate from domain. OpenAPI @Operation annotations.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: WidgetController with CRUD endpoints. POST /widgets (201), GET /widgets/:id (200/404), GET /widgets (200), PUT /widgets/:id (200/404). CommandGateway/QueryGateway usage. OpenAPI annotations.

module.name: products/widget-demo
module.purpose: Widget REST API controller and DTOs

dependency.name: spring-boot-starter-web
dependency.usage: Spring Web MVC for REST controllers

constraints.constraint: Correct HTTP status codes: 201 Created, 200 OK, 404 Not Found, 400 Bad Request

pattern.name: REST Controller CQRS Pattern

standards.validation: HTTP status codes and response formats

ideas.idea: Integration test: GET /widgets → HTTP 200 with pagination
Test CreateWidgetRequest has @NotBlank on name field
Test validation error → HTTP 400 Bad Request
Integration test: POST → GET → PUT → GET (full CRUD flow)
Manual: Verify Widget endpoints visible in Swagger
Test GET non-existent widget returns 404 Not Found
Test validation failure returns 400 Bad Request
